title: Legacy001 RealMLP second seed average
summary: Add a second RealMLP seed to the legacy-001 root and average the two probability predictions.
rationale: The simplest ensemble test is another RealMLP with the same pipeline and a different seed. This isolates neural seed variance before introducing CatBoost, XGBoost, LightGBM, stacking, or calibration.
implementation_hint: Start from legacy-001.py. Train the existing RealMLP configuration twice on the same folds with two different seeds, such as the original seed and 829. Average OOF/test probabilities 0.5/0.5. Preserve all features, target encoding, fold definitions, outputs, and validation reporting.
expected_effect: Improve OOF AUC if the RealMLP root has useful seed-level prediction variance.
risk: Training time roughly doubles and the two seeds may be too correlated for meaningful gain.
